use_cases: Main landing page section for SaaS and product websites to showcase value proposition
Marketing site header with prominent call-to-action buttons
Portfolio or personal site hero section with gradient background treatment
Product launch page with multiple CTA variants and accessibility focus
App homepage introducing key features with visual hierarchy
ai_summary: A hero section component designed for landing pages and marketing websites, featuring a clean minimalist design with gradient accents. The component integrates a flexible button system with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) using Radix UI primitives for accessibility. Includes ring-based focus states, smooth transitions, and responsive sizing options for desktop and mobile platforms.
